response.original_title: Journey to Epcot Center: A Symphonic History
response.overview: On December 15, 1966, Walt Disney died. Sixteen years later, on October 1, 1982, EPCOT Center opened. This documentary covers the journey that took place in between.
response.tagline: On December 15, 1966, Walt Disney died. Sixteen years later, on October 1, 1982, EPCOT Center opened. This documentary covers the journey that took place in between.
response.title: Journey to Epcot Center: A Symphonic History
